name: arboretum
description: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

interface.shortDescription: Governed software-development workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Arboretum to route coding-agent work through governed workflows, project initialization, design, build orchestration, verification, pull requests, cleanup, and reflection.
defaultPrompt: Use Arboretum /start to route this change.
Use Arboretum /build for this design spec.
